   "reasoning": "We can't just prop up the system with more funding when we don't have a clear plan to address the core issues of retention and resource allocation. But we do need to address the root causes of dropout risk - financial struggles - so I'm doubling down on student scholarships. And let's be honest, we need to get our priorities straight and reallocate resources to where they'll make the biggest impact, not just throw some extra money at the problem.",
